Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x0F13 "DUOTRIS-0F13" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Duotris.prg"
Metadata.Notes: NOP'd out the calls to the kernal load routine ($FFD5) at $0F30 the kernal save routine ($FFD8) at $0EA9 to remove disk access from the game.
